title: Filipino-Style Pancit with Cucumber Relish
description: A refreshing and flavorful twist on the classic Filipino noodle dish, featuring a crunchy cucumber relish.

ingredients.name: canton-style vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as cabbage, carrots, and bean sprouts

instructions: Cook the fresh noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumber, floral water (if using), and a pinch of salt. Let it sit for 10-15 minutes to allow the cucumber to release its excess water.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl with the cucumber mixture and toss to combine.
In a separate pan, heat the pancit sauce over medium heat. Add the canton-style vegetables and cook until they are tender-crisp.
Add the cooked noodles and vegetable mixture to the pan with the pancit sauce. Toss everything together to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of persian lime juice.
